arts.ttl: Football transfer rumours: Santos in for Neymar instead of Josh Windass?
arts.sum: Today’s fluff is not something we thought we would write After failing to secure the services of Sheffield Wednesday’s Josh Windass – son of Dean – Santos are in for Neymar. Not a sentence the Rumour Mill thought it would be writing in 2025, but we are where we are. Sheffield may have long been known as the “São Paulo of Yorkshire” and Windass is among the top scorers in the Championship with 10 goals but a deal for Neymar is probably more desirable given the player’s long history with the club. Neymar came through the academy at Santos, putting up silly numbers and scoring silly goals before his big-money move to Barcelona in 2013. Al-Hilal, Neymar’s current team, have not registered him for the rest of the Saudi season and are keen to get the injury-prone Brazilian’s gargantuan wages off the books, So Santos’s reported loan proposal is expected to be accepted, with other interest from Chicago Fire falling away. If Neymar does leave Al-Hilal, that could open up more uncertainty for Liverpool with the Saudi club long-time admirers of Mohamed Salah. The Egyptian’s Anfield contract expires this summer, in case you haven’t heard. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Neymar close to agreeing romantic reunion with Saudi exit
arts.sum: Neymar has six months remaining on his lucrative Al Hilal contract and could join Santos on a loan deal to cover the remainder of that time. A return to Santos would be a romantic move for a player who lifted the team to new heights in the early years of his glittering career.

arts.ttl: Alfredo Morelos set for dream Neymar pairing as flop Rangers boss Pedro Caixinha makes transfer pitch to Santos legend
arts.sum: Pedro Caixinha is set to manage the Brazilian superstar as he prepares to leave Al-Hilal

arts.ttl: Transfer rumors, news: Santos eye fairytale Neymar homecoming
arts.sum: Neymar has been linked with a stunning return to Santos, the club where he made his name. Transfer Talk has the latest news, gossip and rumors.

arts.ttl: Former Barcelona star Neymar on the verge of transfer away from Saudi Arabia
arts.sum: Barcelona icon Neymar Jr. is all set for an incoming departure from the Saudi Pro League. That’s according to transfer insider Fabrizio Romano, who points towards Brazilian giants Santos as…

arts.ttl: Neymar transfer news: Al-Hilal star agrees SENSATIONAL Santos return
arts.sum: A reunion with Lionel Messi and Luis Suarez at Inter Miami has been touted as a serious option for Neymar, while Chicago Fire are also in talks over a surprise move for the 32-year-old. Neymar has reportedly agreed to re-join Santos on loan as his spell at Al-Hilal draws to a close.
